languages.text: "Поиск грани, Вольный Торговец. Грани, которую Священное железо способно выдержать, а живые ткани преодолеть не в силах. Я пытаюсь постичь, до какой степени возможно осуществить реверс-аугментацию, не допуская гибели реципиента. И я сам, как носитель большого количества имплантов, здесь идеальный опытный образец".

"I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.
languages.original_text: "Поиск грани, Вольный Торговец. Грани, которую Священное железо способно выдержать, а живые ткани преодолеть не в силах. Я пытаюсь постичь, до какой степени возможно осуществить реверс-аугментацию, не допуская гибели реципиента. И я сам, как носитель большого количества имплантов, здесь идеальный опытный образец".

traits.locale_text: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

"I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

"I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

languages.text: "Ich suche die Grenze, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Die Grenze, der Ferrum sanctum widerstehen kann, lebendes Gewebe aber nicht. Ich will herausfinden, inwieweit eine Deinstallation von Augmentation möglich ist, ohne den Empfänger zu töten. Und ich selbst bin als Träger einer großen Zahl von Implantaten das ideale Versuchsobjekt."
languages.original_text: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

traits.locale_text: "Ich suche die Grenze, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Die Grenze, der Ferrum sanctum widerstehen kann, lebendes Gewebe aber nicht. Ich will herausfinden, inwieweit eine Deinstallation von Augmentation möglich ist, ohne den Empfänger zu töten. Und ich selbst bin als Träger einer großen Zahl von Implantaten das ideale Versuchsobjekt."

languages.text: « Je cherche la limite, {rt_mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. La limite de ce que peut supporter le Ferrum Sanctum quand le tissu vivant n'en est plus capable. J'essaie de comprendre à quel point il est possible de supprimer une augmentation sans tuer son porteur. Et en tant que porteur d'un grand nombre d'implants, je représente un sujet d'expérience idéal. »
languages.original_text: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

traits.locale_text: « Je cherche la limite, {rt_mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. La limite de ce que peut supporter le Ferrum Sanctum quand le tissu vivant n'en est plus capable. J'essaie de comprendre à quel point il est possible de supprimer une augmentation sans tuer son porteur. Et en tant que porteur d'un grand nombre d'implants, je représente un sujet d'expérience idéal. »

languages.text: “我正在探寻极限，行商浪人。探寻血肉之躯无法承受、但钢铁圣所可以承受的极限。我试图理解，在不导致受体死亡的前提下，逆向改造植入物究竟可以推进到何种程度。而我本身，作为拥有大量植入物的载体，正是最理想的实验样本。”
languages.original_text: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

traits.locale_text: “我正在探寻极限，行商浪人。探寻血肉之躯无法承受、但钢铁圣所可以承受的极限。我试图理解，在不导致受体死亡的前提下，逆向改造植入物究竟可以推进到何种程度。而我本身，作为拥有大量植入物的载体，正是最理想的实验样本。”

languages.text: «Estoy buscando el límite, Comerciante Independiente. El momento en el que el ferrum sanctum resiste, pero el tejido vivo no. Intento percibir hasta qué punto es posible invertir el proceso de aumento sin matar al portador. Y, como tengo un número considerable de implantes, soy mi propio sujeto de pruebas ideal».
languages.original_text: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

traits.locale_text: «Estoy buscando el límite, Comerciante Independiente. El momento en el que el ferrum sanctum resiste, pero el tejido vivo no. Intento percibir hasta qué punto es posible invertir el proceso de aumento sin matar al portador. Y, como tengo un número considerable de implantes, soy mi propio sujeto de pruebas ideal».

languages.text: "エッジ "を探しているんだ、フリー・トレーダー。神聖な金属は耐えられるが...生きた組織は耐えられない。受信者を殺すことなく どこまでオーグメンテーションを 逆行させることができるかを 解明しようとしている"大量のフェルム・サンクタムを 持つ私自身が" "完璧なプロトタイプだ"
languages.original_text: "Searching for the edge, Free Trader. The edge that sacred metal can withstand but living tissue cannot. I am trying to fathom the extent to which it is possible to reverse augmentation without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large amount of Ferrum Sanctum, am the perfect prototype here."

languages.text: "Sınırı arıyorum Hür Tacir. Demir Kutak'ın dayanabileceği ancak canlı dokunun dayanamayacağı sınırı. Tersine ogmentasyonun alıcıyı öldürmeden ne ölçüde gerçekleştirilebileceğini algılamaya çalışıyorum. Çok sayıda implanta sahip biri olarak ideal deneğim."
languages.original_text: "I am seeking the limit, Rogue Trader. The limit that Ferrum Sanctum can withstand, but living tissue cannot. I am trying to perceive the extent to which reverse augmentation can be accomplished without killing the recipient. And I myself, as the bearer of a large number of implants, am the ideal specimen.

traits.locale_text: "Sınırı arıyorum Hür Tacir. Demir Kutak'ın dayanabileceği ancak canlı dokunun dayanamayacağı sınırı. Tersine ogmentasyonun alıcıyı öldürmeden ne ölçüde gerçekleştirilebileceğini algılamaya çalışıyorum. Çok sayıda implanta sahip biri olarak ideal deneğim."
